patents.title: AI Agent Skill Content Sanitization
patents.full_title: Multi-State Classification and Targeted Sanitization of AI Agent Skill Content
patents.description: Classifies and sanitizes AI agent skill content across multiple states to prevent injection of malicious capabilities into agentic AI systems.

patents.title: Indirect Prompt Injection Detector
patents.full_title: Agentic Web-based Indirect Prompt Injection (IDPI) Detector
patents.description: Detects indirect prompt injection attacks targeting web-based agentic AI systems, defending LLM agents against adversarial inputs embedded in web content.

patents.title: Browser Agent Web-Threat Protection
patents.full_title: A Method for Protecting Browser Agents from Web-Based Threats
patents.description: Systematic method to protect browser-based AI agents from web-based threats including prompt hijacking, data exfiltration, and malicious tool misuse.

patents.title: Evasive Malware in Deep Learning Models
patents.full_title: Detecting Evasive Malware Embedded in Deep Learning Models that Abuse Hidden Functionalities
patents.description: Detection system for malware hidden inside deep learning model artifacts that abuse hidden functionalities — addressing the emerging threat of weaponized AI models.

patents.title: Browser Extension Squatting
patents.full_title: Browser Extension Squatting: Anticipating GenAI-Hallucinated Extensions Before Attackers Do
patents.description: Proactively identifies browser extensions that generative AI models are likely to hallucinate, creating a defensive blocklist before attackers exploit LLM hallucination behavior.

patents.title: IUPG: Adversarial-Resistant Deep Learning
patents.full_title: Innocent Until Proven Guilty (IUPG): Building Adversarial Resistant and False Positive Resistant Deep Learning Models
patents.description: Framework for training deep learning models that are resistant to adversarial examples and maintain low false positive rates — foundational work in robust ML for security.

patents.title: CRXAgent: Agentic Extension Detection
patents.full_title: CRXAgent: Agentic Malicious Extension Detection with Semantic Understanding and Efficient Code Analysis
patents.description: LLM-agent-based detection of malicious Chrome extensions using semantic code understanding and efficient static analysis, catching novel threats missed by signature-based tools.

patents.title: Browser Extension FP Check Analyzer
patents.full_title: Multi-Dimensional False Positive Check Analyzer for Browser Extension Security
patents.description: Multi-dimensional analysis system to reduce false positives in browser extension security detection, improving operational accuracy at scale.

patents.title: Defensively Registered Domain Detector
patents.full_title: Defensively Registered Domain Detector: LLM-Based Attribution of Defensively Registered Domains to Brands
patents.description: LLM based attribution of defensively registered domains to brands.

patents.title: RAG-Based Extension Impersonation Detector
patents.full_title: RAG Based Agentic Detection of Malicious Impersonating Browser Extensions
patents.description: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) agentic system that detects browser extensions impersonating legitimate ones, using semantic similarity over a curated extension knowledge base.
patents.file: Patent - Malicious Impersonating Browser Extension Detector.pdf

patents.title: Detecting Defensively Registered Domains via LLMs
patents.full_title: Detecting Defensively Registered Domains Using LLMs
patents.description: LLM-powered system that identifies domains registered defensively by organizations to prevent brand abuse, enabling better threat intelligence prioritization.

patents.title: Inline Extension Security Prevention
patents.full_title: Advanced Extension Security: Preventing Installation of Malicious and Compromised Extensions with Inline Analysis
patents.description: Inline analysis system that blocks malicious or compromised browser extension installations and updates in real time, before execution.

patents.title: Multimodal Extension Risk Scoring
patents.full_title: Multimodal Risk Scoring of Chrome Extensions Using an LLM Agent with Tools
patents.description: Multimodal LLM agent equipped with analysis tools that scores Chrome extension risk by examining permissions, code behavior, and visual signals simultaneously.

patents.title: Real-Time Certified Hijacking Detection
patents.full_title: Real-Time Detection and Mitigation of Certified Hijacking Attacks
patents.description: Real-time system that detects and mitigates certificate-based hijacking attacks by monitoring certificate transparency logs for anomalous issuance patterns.
patents.file: Real-Time Certified Malicious Domains Patent Application.pdf

patents.title: Pastejacking Detector
patents.full_title: Methods and Tools to Detect Pastejacking Web Attacks Leveraging Dynamic Analysis and LLM Agents
patents.description: Detects pastejacking attacks — where malicious websites silently alter clipboard content — using dynamic browser analysis and LLM agents to identify malicious intent.

patents.title: AVA: OAuth Flow Abuse Detector
patents.full_title: AVA: Authentication Verification Analyzer for Detecting OAuth Flow Abuses
patents.description: Analyzes OAuth authentication flows to detect abuse patterns including consent phishing, token hijacking, and malicious app impersonation.

patents.title: Multimodal In-Browser Malicious Site Detection
patents.full_title: Multimodal In-Browser System for Detecting Malicious Websites with Optimized Cloud Support
patents.description: In-browser multimodal ML system for real-time malicious website detection combining visual, textual, and structural signals with efficient cloud backend support.

patents.title: GraphSeek
patents.full_title: GraphSeek: GraphRAG Powered LLMs for Detection and Attribution of Malicious Campaign IoCs
patents.description: Graph-powered RAG system using LLMs to detect and attribute indicators of compromise (IoCs) across malicious campaigns, enabling analysts to pivot through related threat infrastructure.

patents.title: AI Social Engineering Defense
patents.full_title: AI Social Engineering Defense: A Grounded AI-Based Pipeline for Detecting Social Engineering Attacks Across a Variety of Modalities
patents.description: Grounded AI pipeline detecting social engineering attacks across voice, text, image, and video modalities — multi-modal defense against next-generation phishing.

patents.title: URLAgent
patents.full_title: URLAgent: Autonomously Assess the Maliciousness of URLs Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in LLMs
patents.description: LLM-powered autonomous agent that assesses URL maliciousness by combining chain-of-thought reasoning with live tool use — screenshot analysis, content inspection, and threat intel lookups.

patents.title: TI Ninja
patents.full_title: Real-Time Automated Extraction of Campaign CTI from Threat Reports
patents.description: Autonomous agent that ingests threat intelligence reports and performs real-time structured extraction of campaign CTI — actors, TTPs, indicators — producing actionable intelligence at scale.

patents.title: CampaignNet
patents.full_title: CampaignNet: URL Representation Learning Based Detection of Patient-Zero Campaigns and Related Malicious URLs
patents.description: Graph representation learning system that identifies patient-zero phishing campaigns and clusters related malicious URLs for automated campaign attribution.

patents.title: Deepscam
patents.full_title: Deepscam: A Transfer Learning Approach to Detecting HTML of Web Scams
patents.description: Transfer learning model that analyzes HTML structure and content of web pages to detect scam sites with high precision, generalizing across novel scam templates.

patents.title: AI Deepfake Detection Pipeline
patents.full_title: Artificial Intelligence Powered Deepfake Detection Filtering Pipeline
patents.description: End-to-end AI pipeline for real-time deepfake detection and filtering, combining visual artifact analysis with behavioral signals to catch synthetic media used in fraud.

patents.title: GNN Campaign Detection
patents.full_title: Automated Discovery of Malicious Website Campaign Infrastructure Using Graph Neural Networks
patents.description: Graph neural network system that automatically discovers and maps malicious campaign infrastructure by modeling relationships between domains, IPs, and certificates.

patents.title: Stockpiled Domain Detection
patents.full_title: Methods to Detect Malicious Stockpiled Domain Names
patents.description: Detection methods for identifying domains that attackers register and hold in reserve ('stockpile') before launching coordinated campaigns, enabling proactive blocking.

patents.title: Domain Spider
patents.full_title: Proactively Discovering Malicious Domains Through Guided Crawling of Attack Infrastructure
patents.description: Guided crawler that traverses attack infrastructure through WHOIS relationships, certificate transparency, and DNS pivots to proactively map and block malicious domain networks.

patents.title: ML Domain Risk Scoring
patents.full_title: Real-Time Detection of Malicious URLs Based on ML-Powered Domain Risk Scoring
patents.description: ML pipeline combining lexical, behavioral, and graph features to produce real-time domain risk scores, powering downstream URL filtering and security policy decisions.
patents.file: Patent Application ML based Domain Risk Scoring and Applications .pdf
